title: CustomerRegistered
description: Published when a new customer account is successfully created. Consumed by Orders (customer validity cache) and downstream analytics.

customerId.description: Stable identifier for the Customer aggregate. Never changes after registration.

email.description: Email address at time of registration. Unique across all customers (INV-CUS-001). PII — handle per data classification policy.

registeredAt.description: UTC timestamp of the registration event. May differ from occurredAt if there was processing latency.

marketingConsent.description: Whether the customer opted in to marketing communications at registration time.

acquisitionChannel.description: Channel through which the customer was acquired. Used for analytics; not used in domain logic.
